items.name: Pink Berry
items.shortDesc: Heals 25% HP and cures any status when HP drops below 50%.

items.name: Life Fragment
items.shortDesc: Boosts all moves by 1.3x but takes 10% recoil.

items.name: Leftovers Clone
items.shortDesc: Heals 1/16 of max HP at the end of each turn.

items.name: Vest of Might
items.shortDesc: Takes half damage from Special moves but can't use Status moves.

items.name: Orb of Aura
items.shortDesc: When hit by contact, attacker takes 1/6 max HP damage.
